message:
feat(convoy): add --owned flag to gt convoy create and gt sling

Owned convoys have caller-managed lifecycle semantics: no automatic
witness/refinery registration, manual landing via gt convoy land.

- gt convoy create --owned stores gt:owned label on convoy bead
- gt sling --owned propagates to auto-convoy creation
- gt convoy status shows lifecycle: caller-managed for owned convoys
- JSON output includes owned boolean field

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
